content: Reporting, I have finished the WoD Translation for Chaos Awakener.

FOR VOLUNTEERS OF ALL LANGUAGES:
Here's all the Relics I could find! Sectioned off into separate sheets for Faded Legacy (Act 1), Astral Reign (Act 2), Dimensional Images, Chrono Pendulums, and everything else.
Still relatively new to the game so I wasn't sure what was or wasn't an Event relic, so I just grouped together what I was sure of.

IMPORTANT/README:
1. The **Font and Typeface of all relevant cells have been standardized to the default Excel style**; I don't know yet if this will cause unforeseen issues, so my bad if I shouldn't have done that.
2. **I added a Column** to the sheet to make organization easier.
  - COLUMN A:A "SRC ROW" is the original Row # that the line was pulled from in the "Gameplay" Source Sheet.
  - DELETE THIS COLUMN (A:A) to return the worksheet to the positions of its original columns.
3. IN SOME CASES, **The Sheet Rows have been RE-ORDERED** to help facilitate ease of understanding.

HOPE THIS HELPS! May the Silver Key guide us.

Monsters/Enemies/Intentions are next, while I slowly attempt to put together Awakeners. <:aurita_dizzy:1408324284702654556>
